zh.lifeSummary: 當Boudewijn de Gent於大約1053年出生在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫阿爾斯特時，他的父親Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln59歲，母親Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg46歲。他於大約1067年與Ade D'Avesnes-De-Chievres II Of Holland結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1082年4月24日在白展丁 艾皮爾尼亞享年30歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Boudewijn de Gent于大约1053年出生在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫阿爾斯特时，他的父亲Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln59岁，母亲Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg46岁。他于大约1067年与Ade D'Avesnes-De-Chievres II Of Holland结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1082年4月24日在白展丁 艾皮爾尼亞享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gent
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern) and French: nickname from Old French gent, Middle English gent(e) ‘high born, noble’, hence ‘noble of character or conduct, courteous’, also ‘nice, friendly’.
English: habitational name from Ghent (Gent in Dutch), a city in Flanders, Belgium. Compare Ghent .
German: from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name formed with gand ‘spell’, such as Gandolf.

variants.name: Ghent
meanings: English: habitational name from Ghent (Gent in Dutch), a city in Flanders, Belgium. Compare Gent .

variants.name: Gentes
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Henri, Lucien, Marcel, Normand.
French (Gentès): probably a nickname derived from Old French gent ‘high born, noble’, also ‘nice, friendly’.
German: patronymic from the personal name   Gent  .

variants.name: Genther
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Fritz, Otto.

variants.name: Genthe
meanings: German: variant of Gente (see Gent ), or a habitational name from Gentha in Saxony-Anhalt, east of Wittenberg.

en.lifeSummary: When Boudewijn de Gent was born about 1053, in Aalst, East Flanders, Belgium, his father, Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln, was 59 and his mother, Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg, was 46. He married Ade D'Avesnes-De-Chievres II Of Holland about 1067. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 24 April 1082, in Nicea, Byzantine Empire, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Boudewijn de Gent est né environ 1053, à Aalst, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique, son père, Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln, avait 59 ans et sa mère, Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg, avait 46 ans. Il a épousé Ade D'Avesnes-De-Chievres II Of Holland environ 1067. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 24 avril 1082, à Nicea, Empire byzantin, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Boudewijn de Gent um 1053 in Aalst, Ostflandern, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln 59 und seine Mutter Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg 46. Er hat um 1067 Ade D'Avesnes-De-Chievres II Of Holland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 24. April 1082 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Nicea, Byzantinisches Reich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Boudewijn de Gent è nato il circa 1053 nel Aalst, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio, il suo padre, Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln, aveva 59 anni e il suo madre, Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg, aveva 46 anni. Lui sposato Ade D'Avesnes-De-Chievres II Of Holland circa 1067. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 24 aprile 1082, nel Nicea, Impero bizantino, all'età di 30 anni.

ja.Aalst, Limbourg, Belgique: ベルギーリンブルグアールスト

ja.lifeSummary: Boudewijn de Gentが約1053年にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンアールストで生まれた時，父Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincolnは59歳，母Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourgは46歳であった。約1067年にAde D'Avesnes-De-Chievres II Of Hollandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1082年4月24日に東ローマ帝国ニセアで30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Boudewijn de Gent(이)가 대략 1053년 벨기에 스트-블라아더 알스트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln(은)는 59세였고, 그의 어머니 Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg(은)는 46세였다. 그는 대략 1067년 Ade D'Avesnes-De-Chievres II Of Holland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1082년 4월 24일 비자틴 피르 나이스아에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Boudewijn de Gent nasceu aproximadamente 1053, em Aalst, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica, seu pai, Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln, tinha 59 anos e sua mãe, Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg, tinha 46 anos. Ele casou-se com Ade D'Avesnes-De-Chievres II Of Holland aproximadamente 1067. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 24 de abril de 1082, em Nicea, Império Bizantino, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Boudewijn de Gent родился около 1053 г. в местности аалст, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln было 59 лет, а матери, которую звали Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg, 46. Он женился на женщине по имени Ade D'Avesnes-De-Chievres II Of Holland около 1067 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 24 апреля 1082 г. в местности наисеа, Византийская империя в возрасте 30 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Boudewijn de Gent nació aproximadamente 1053, en Aalst, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica, su papá, Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln, tenía 59 años y su mamá, Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg, tenía 46 años. Se casó con Ade D'Avesnes-De-Chievres II Of Holland aproximadamente 1067. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 24 de abril de 1082, en Nicea, Imperio bizantino, a la edad de 30 años.
